title: belou marmelos
intro: Belou marmelos, also known as Aegle marmelos, is a deciduous tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of belou marmelos include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties that protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the tree's parts are used to prepare herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, as well as being dried and used in teas and tinctures.
